caption: A woman with blond-tipped hair, wearing a black t-shirt and over-ear headphones, is seated in a recording studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone and faces slightly to the left with a smile on her face. The background consists of a white wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a black panel. A screen behind her displays the word "Johnson" in red text and the phrase "Employee-Only" in smaller white letters. Several logos appear on screen, including one that says "BOSS TALK 101" and another that reads "PODCAST" underneath a circular graphic. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a stationary position, maintaining her expression and posture, while the scene remains static with no visible movement or change in the environment.
